applicationKeyId.description: The ID of the newly created key

applicationKey.description: The secret key - only returned at creation time

accountId.description: The account this key is associated with

capabilities.description: A list of capabilities this key has

expirationTimestamp.description: When this key expires, or null for no expiration

bucketId.description: Restrict key to this bucket, or null for all buckets

namePrefix.description: Restrict key to file names starting with this prefix
